generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLidarPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor current or torque feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorActuationDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering servo position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance RawLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorActuationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorFeedbackSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringFeedbackSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance ProjectedPathDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor, LidarSensor
]

instance RawLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data collected from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model for object representation in 3D space"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering of raw LiDAR point clouds for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Kalman filter for trajectory tracking of detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for software development and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for data processing scripts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi infrastructure for low-latency communication between physical and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring via UI displaying real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, with capabilities to save and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedPathInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, SaveReportAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading where the ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands are processed externally (e.g., cloud) to alleviate on-board hardware constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and send emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmdAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path based on current trajectory"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance SaveReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save generated reports to persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate detailed reports from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using external computation for ACC"
]

instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle for ACC"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send actuation commands to physical vehicle for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable ACC functionality remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands such as emergency braking and desired speed adjustments are generated by the Controlling FE and sent to the Actuation component, which converts desired speed into motor voltage commands. The Control Panel User Interface FE enables remote management of ACC, with data translation ensuring proper command formatting for physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular application standards, though hardware limitations prevent stricter synchronization than this threshold."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with entity-based structuring, mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) is deployed on separate hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity extending beyond ISO 23247's OME to host general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking. The User Interface FE is split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components, while Data Storage lacks a direct FE alignment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal software components communicate via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi. Requirement R7 mandates a maximum network latency of 100 ms. No details on bandwidth, security protocols, or redundancy mechanisms are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247:2021 standard defines the Digital Twin framework for manufacturing, with four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 specifies the reference architecture entities including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities handle specific tasks like data transformation, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as an implementation example for interoperability."
]
